## Description
Brief summary of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Code quality

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number), or remove this line if no related issue.

## Testing
How have you tested these changes?

- [ ] Tested locally with `./start_build.sh --params-file params/tinyconfig.params`
- [ ] Ran QA tests: `./scripts/material_analysis.sh`
- [ ] Validated parameters: `./scripts/validate_params.sh`
- [ ] Updated documentation (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] Changes follow project conventions
- [ ] Code is tested and working
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented in description)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)

## Notes
Any additional context for reviewers.
